menu_item.title: MenuItem
menu_item.description: A beverage item available for order from the menu

id.description: The unique ID of the menu item

name.description: The Chinese name of the drink

englishName.description: The English name of the drink

category.description: Category of the drink, e.g., 台灣原茶

priceM.description: Price of the Medium size (null if not available)

isRecommended.description: Is it a highly recommended item

tags.description: List of tags, e.g., ['特等獎茶師', '招牌必喝']

onSale.description: Whether the drink is currently active and available

order.title: Order
order.description: A customer order containing chosen drinks and checkout info

customerName.description: Name of the customer placing order

items.description: List of ordered items with customized ice, sugar, toppings

totalPrice.description: Overal sum of order in TWD

system_config.title: SystemConfig
system_config.description: Internal system configurations, specifically the admin security credentials

isConfigured.description: True once the admin password has initially been configured

menu_items/{itemId}.description: Collection of all drinks in the tea shop menu

orders/{orderId}.description: Collection of incoming as well as historical customer orders

system_config/{configId}.description: Configuration collection targeting high level system values
